query:
CREATE TABLE `exchangeRates` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`fromCurrency` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'YER',
	`toCurrency` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
	`rate` decimal(12,4) NOT NULL,
	`updatedBy` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `exchangeRates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MBvjb22zsTLGjv.root --database nZ3PMMgYbyq8w7M3TYvKBC --execute CREATE TABLE `exchangeRates` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`fromCurrency` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'YER',
	`toCurrency` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
	`rate` decimal(12,4) NOT NULL,
	`updatedBy` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `exchangeRates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
